mapper.sql: select id, name, sku_code, brand, model, category_id, guide_price, price_unit, designer_discount, regions, space_tags, scene_tags, spec_params, description, status, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from bh_product
mapper.update: update bh_product set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update bh_product set status = 'archived', del_flag = '1', update_time = now() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'

update bh_product set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where del_flag = '0' and id in
#{id}

update bh_product set status = 'archived', del_flag = '1', update_time = now() where del_flag = '0' and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select media_id, type, url, thumbnail_url, file_format, file_size, file_name from bh_media where product_id = #{productId} order by sort_order asc, media_id asc
